basic_details.job_title: BMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Intensivist, Medical Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Speciality Medical Consultant, Intensivist, Medical Officer
basic_details.short_information: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) Speciality Medical Consultant, Intensivist, Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of BMC. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the BMC Speciality Medical Consultant, Intensivist, Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/DNB or PG Diploma in Anesthesia, MD/DNB or PG Diploma in General Medicine/Respiratory Medicine/Anesthesia/Critical Care/Emergency Medicine, MBBS
qualification.details: Speciality Medical Consultant (Anesthesia): MD/DNB or PG Diploma in Anesthesia from a recognized university. Intensivist: MD/DNB or PG Diploma in General Medicine/Respiratory Medicine/Anesthesia/Critical Care/Emergency Medicine. Preference to MD/DNB General Medicine. PG Diploma candidates require a minimum of 12 months of experience in Intensive Care. Medical Officer: MBBS from a recognized university.

salary_details.details: Speciality Medical Consultant (Anesthesia): Rs. 90,000/- - Rs. 2,00,000/- Per Month Intensivist: Rs. 90,000/- - Rs. 2,00,000/- Per Month Medical Officer: Rs. 90,000/- - Rs. 2,00,000/- Per Month

selection_process: Merit List based on educational qualification and interview marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BMC Recruitment 2026 is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced by BMC for the posts of Speciality Medical Consultant, Intensivist, and Medical Officer in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for BMC Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Medical Officer post in BMC Recruitment 2026 ranges from Rs. 90,000/- to Rs. 2,00,000/- per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Intensivist post?
faq.answer: For the Intensivist post, candidates must possess an MD/DNB or PG Diploma in General Medicine/Respiratory Medicine/Anesthesia/Critical Care/Emergency Medicine. Preference is given to MD/DNB General Medicine candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee for General/OBC category candidates, which is Rs. 870 plus 18% GST. No fee is mentioned for other categories in the provided data.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for BMC Recruitment 2026 will be based on a merit list prepared from educational qualification and interview marks, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply through online mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for BMC Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates are required to submit their applications physically to the specified address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions in BMC Recruitment 2026 is contract-based. Candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for BMC Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
